buggy_code_snippet: class UserLabeler { String label(int score) { if (score > 0) { return "ok"; } } }
fixed_code_snippet: class UserLabeler { String label(int score) { if (score > 0) { return "ok"; } return "unknown"; } }
explanation: Method declares String return type; add explicit fallback return on uncovered control-flow path to satisfy compiler.
risk_note: Fallback literal may hide business rule gaps if caller expects error signaling.

buggy_code_snippet: class FeatureSwitch { boolean enabled(String flag) { if (flag == null) { return false; } if (flag.startsWith("exp")) { return true; } } }
fixed_code_snippet: class FeatureSwitch { boolean enabled(String flag) { if (flag == null) { return false; } if (flag.startsWith("exp")) { return true; } return false; } }
explanation: Compiler requires boolean for all paths; add deterministic default false branch.
risk_note: Default false can alter legacy permissive behavior.

buggy_code_snippet: class RetryPolicy { int retries(String level) { if ("high".equals(level)) { return 5; } } }
fixed_code_snippet: class RetryPolicy { int retries(String level) { if ("high".equals(level)) { return 5; } return 1; } }
explanation: Add numeric fallback to satisfy declared int return type and keep deterministic retry baseline.
risk_note: Baseline retry count may be too low for certain traffic patterns.

buggy_code_snippet: class DiscountCalculator { int discount(boolean vip, boolean flashSale) { if (vip) { return 20; } else if (flashSale) { return 10; } } }
fixed_code_snippet: class DiscountCalculator { int discount(boolean vip, boolean flashSale) { if (vip) { return 20; } else if (flashSale) { return 10; } return 0; } }
explanation: Control-flow graph has uncovered path when both conditions false; add explicit final return.
risk_note: Returning zero may not match intended default discount policy.

buggy_code_snippet: class GreetingBuilder { String build(boolean formal) { String prefix; if (formal) { prefix = "Dear"; } return prefix + " user"; } }
fixed_code_snippet: class GreetingBuilder { String build(boolean formal) { String prefix = "Hi"; if (formal) { prefix = "Dear"; } return prefix + " user"; } }
explanation: Initialize local variable with safe default before conditional assignment.
risk_note: Default salutation changes output for non-formal users.

buggy_code_snippet: class OrderMapper { int toId(String rawId) { return rawId; } }
fixed_code_snippet: class OrderMapper { int toId(String rawId) { return Integer.parseInt(rawId); } }
explanation: Resolve primitive type mismatch by explicit parse conversion.
risk_note: Can throw NumberFormatException for non-numeric input; caller may need guard.
